$comment: Cluster definitions for the self-improve single-cluster-rule (Policy 1). Extracted 1:1 from skills/self-improve/SKILL.md at the v4.0.0 trim (2026-07-06); original table dated 2026-04-30. scope=internal: part of this plugin repo; scope=external: foreign plugin/repo — kept for completeness, a self-improve run in THIS repo must not mutate external entries.
rule: Exactly ONE cluster per self-improve run. If a run would have to enter a second cluster, ABORT and request user intervention.

clusters.name: memory-cluster
clusters.notes: agentic-os is this plugin (default self-improvement target).
